title: High-End Scrollytelling Portfolio
shortDescription: A modern, high-performance portfolio with complex scroll animations.
fullDescription: Built with Next.js, Framer Motion, and HTML5 Canvas, this project demonstrates advanced scroll-linked animations and a dynamic scrollytelling experience. It seamlessly transitions through an image sequence as a background layer, revealing various narrative sections. It leverages Server Components, custom Tailwind configurations, and optimal asset loading techniques to maintain 60FPS animations.

title: AI Finance Dashboard
shortDescription: An AI-powered dashboard for real-time financial tracking and predictions.
fullDescription: A full-stack application that provides real-time insights into market trends and personal financial health. The backend uses Java and Spring Boot for robust data processing and integrates with Python-based ML models via an API to offer predictive analysis on stock trends. The frontend provides interactive charting and dynamic data updates using WebSockets.

title: E-Commerce Microservices
shortDescription: A scalable backend for an e-commerce platform using microservices architecture.
fullDescription: A robust backend system built entirely on the microservices pattern. It features separate services for User Authentication, Product Catalog, Order Processing, and Payment APIs. It uses Apache Kafka for asynchronous event-driven communication between services. Docker and Kubernetes are used to containerize and orchestrate the highly available infrastructure.
